title: Fix Read-Only Permission for List Score Card View
story: As a shared user with read-only permissions, I want to be able to view list score cards, so that I can see the data my admin has shared with me.
description: Read-only permission for shared accounts was not allowing access to the list score card view. The permission check needed to be updated to include the list score card view as part of the read-only permission set.
acceptance_criteria: Read-only users can access the list score card view
No write capabilities are granted to read-only users on score cards
middleware_changes: Updated permission checks to allow read-only users access to the list score card view.
